title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Agriculture and Fisheries to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to establish community fridges to address food insecurity.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, December 8, 2025 -- The committee on Agriculture and Fisheries, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 62) of Adam Gómez and Homar Gómez for legislation to establish community fridges to address food insecurity, report the accompanying Order (Senate, No. 2804).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Agriculture and Fisheries
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules

sponsorships.name: Joint Committee on Agriculture and Fisheries
